query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `classification_logs` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `rawText` text NOT NULL, `category` varchar(64), `subCategory` varchar(64), `title` text, `confidence` varchar(10), `syncedTo` json, `aiRawResponse` text, `noteId` int, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `classification_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
